headline: Allocate Partners with Valhalla Group to Accelerate Private Markets Operations
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 02, 2026--Allocate, a private markets infrastructure platform serving wealth advisors and fund managers, today announced a strategic relationship with Valhalla Group, the private equity firm led by former Northern Trust executive, Trey Hart. Through this integration, Valhalla Group will leverage Allocate's comprehensive technology infrastructure to enhance portfolio tracking and streamline fundraising operations.

headline: Givers’ regret: What happens when wealthy parents try to claw back fortunes from their kids
summary: The rich can save big by gifting assets before they die, but some end up in a cash crunch.
